summary: 38-42 analysts cover META. Consensus: Strong Buy. Avg price target $834.16 (some sources cite $837.05-$840.07 median). Range: low $700 to high $1,117. Distribution: 20 Strong Buy, 18 Buy, 4 Hold, 0 Sell. Consensus implies ~39% upside from current levels.
